basic_details.job_title: BMC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Pharmacist, Blood Bank Technician and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Pharmacist, Blood Bank Technician, Librarian, Staff Nurse
basic_details.short_information: Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 5 Pharmacist, Blood Bank Technician, Librarian, Staff Nurse Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 18-06-2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 38 years Age Relaxation: 5 years for backward class candidates (maximum 43 years).

qualification.education_qualification: Diploma/Degree in Pharmacy, Degree/Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology, B.Lib/B.L.I.S, GNM Diploma, Marathi SSC/equivalent with 50% marks, Computer certificate (CCC/MS-CIT/GCC-TBC)
qualification.details: Pharmacist (Drug Manufacturer): Diploma or Degree in Pharmacy from a recognized board/university, registered with Maharashtra State Pharmacy Council, computer certificate (CCC or higher or MS-CIT/GCC-TBC). Blood Bank Technician: Degree or Diploma in Medical Laboratory Technology with experience in blood testing, pass trade test, Marathi SSC or equivalent with 50% marks, computer certificate. Librarian: Graduate in Arts/Commerce/Science, B.Lib/B.L.I.S from a recognized university, library experience preferred, typing knowledge, computer certificate (CCC or MS-CIT/GCC-TBC). Staff Nurse (Paricharika): 12th pass (10+2), GNM Diploma (3 or 3.5 years), registered with Maharashtra Nursing Council, Marathi SSC or equivalent with 50% marks, computer certificate.

selection_process: Merit List based on final year marks Document Verification
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for BMC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 18-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Brihanmumbai Municipal Corporation (BMC) recruitment is 18th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies announced by BMC for the posts of Pharmacist, Blood Bank Technician, Librarian, and Staff Nurse. These positions are on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the BMC posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for all posts is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 38 years. Age relaxation is applicable for backward class candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for BMC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee for both General/OBC and SC/ST categories is Rs. 838/-. This fee needs to be submitted along with the application form.

faq.question: Q5. What is the selection process for these BMC posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will be based on a merit list prepared from the final year marks of the candidates. This will be followed by a document verification stage.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the recruited candidates?
faq.answer: The salary varies based on the post. Pharmacist and Blood Bank Technicians will receive Rs. 20,000/- per month, Librarians will get Rs. 25,000/- per month, and Staff Nurses will be paid Rs. 30,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for the Staff Nurse post?
faq.answer: For the Staff Nurse position, candidates must have passed 12th grade (10+2), possess a GNM Diploma (3 or 3.5 years), be registered with the Maharashtra Nursing Council, and have Marathi SSC or equivalent with 50% marks, along with a computer certificate.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply online for this BMC recruitment?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for this BMC recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it, and send it to the specified address.

faq.question: Q9. What is the contract period for these positions?
faq.answer: The recruitment is on a contractual basis, and the contract period is expected to end on 31st March 2027. This provides a defined tenure for the employment.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the BMC's official website. Direct links are usually provided in the 'Important Links' section of recruitment articles.
